subcodes.first_line: Say: O people! By God, the Ocean hath appeared and upon it saileth the Ark of God. Hold ye fast unto it and follow not every heedless one [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انک قل یا قوم تالله قد ظهر البحر و سرت علیه فلک الله تمسکوا بها و لا تتبعوا کل غافل
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @thankfulness; gratitude, @knowledge; recognition of God
